# Pamplona

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Rellenos](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/cimentaciones-rellenos/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/compresion-simple/)
- [Densidad Cono Arena](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/densidad-cono-arena/)
- [Deslizamientos](https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/deslizamientos/)

## Contact
- Website: https://pamplona.geotecnia.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
